message:
feat(ffs-block): add criterion benchmarks for ARC cache hot paths (bd-3ff)

Four benchmarks covering the cache critical path:
- arc_cache_hit_4k: ~23ns for a resident 4K block read
- arc_cache_miss_4k: ~565ns (in-memory device read + ARC eviction)
- arc_cache_mixed_4k: ~545ns (hit/miss mix over 16-block working set)
- arc_cache_metrics_snapshot: ~5ns (lock + snapshot)

Uses an in-memory ByteDevice to isolate cache overhead from disk I/O.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
